heroPill: Outcome-Focused Technology Consultant | Serving Businesses Globally
heroTitle: Measurable Improvements in Efficiency, Accuracy, and Speed — Through Modern Technology
heroSubtitle: We bridge the gap between expensive enterprise consultancies and unreliable freelancers. Boutique-quality implementation, predictable timelines, and clear deliverables for organizations of all sizes.
brandPromiseSubheader: Every project is delivered with the same commitment — no exceptions.
brandPromiseFastDesc: Sprint-based delivery with working software every 2 weeks. Rapid prototyping and continuous feedback loops so you see progress — not just promises.
brandPromiseStableDesc: Comprehensive automated testing, staged deployments, real-time monitoring from day one, and a 30-day warranty period on every project.
brandPromiseSecureDesc: Security review at architecture phase, automated vulnerability scanning, data encryption, and compliance alignment with HIPAA, GDPR, and SOC 2 principles.
servicesSubheader: Practical technology implementation that creates clear, measurable improvements for your business.
service1Desc: Tailored web applications, backend systems, and mobile solutions that directly address your unique business processes. Built for rapid delivery and long-term maintainability.
service2Desc: Connect disconnected systems and automate repetitive workflows. Eliminate manual data entry, reduce errors, and accelerate your business processes.
service2Highlight: Save 10+ hours per week on manual tasks
service3Desc: AI-powered systems that understand, process, and respond to information automatically — from customer-facing chatbots to internal document processing.
service4Desc: Transform outdated, difficult-to-maintain systems into modern, efficient platforms — without disrupting your business operations.
whyHurevoSubheader: We are not a traditional consultancy that bills by the hour and delivers reports. We build alongside your team and deliver working solutions.
whyHurevo1Desc: Fixed-price projects with clear deliverables tied to measurable business impact. You pay for results — not time sheets.
whyHurevo2Desc: Every 2 weeks you see working software. We build and iterate with your continuous feedback, not in a black box.
whyHurevo3Desc: Enterprise-grade engineering standards and security at pricing accessible to growing businesses. No bloated project teams.
whyHurevo4Desc: Clear scope, fixed pricing, and a 48-hour proposal turnaround. No hidden discovery fees or surprise invoices.
whyHurevo5Desc: Every project ships with a warranty period. If something breaks after launch, we fix it — no additional charges.
whyHurevo6Desc: We move from one-off projects to ongoing improvement partnerships. Your systems evolve as your business grows.
processSubheader: From first call to launch — we keep it straightforward.
processStep1Desc: 30-minute call to understand your goals, current challenges, and identify immediate opportunities.
processStep2Desc: Receive a concise proposal with scope, timeline, fixed pricing, and measurable success criteria.
processStep3Desc: Fast execution with working software demos every 2 weeks and your continuous feedback built in.
processStep4Desc: Deploy with monitoring, team training, and 30-day warranty. Ongoing retainer options available.
industrySubheader: Domain-specific knowledge that translates to faster delivery and better outcomes.
industryProfServicesDesc: Client portals, project tracking, automated billing, and CRM integrations for firms that bill for expertise.
industryProfServicesPoint1: Deep workflow understanding of client lifecycle and billing complexity
industryProfServicesPoint2: Seamless CRM, time tracking, and invoicing integrations
industryProfServicesPoint3: Scalable from 5 to 50+ professionals without rebuilding
industryHealthcareDesc: HIPAA-compliant patient portals, appointment automation, EHR integrations, and clinical workflow tools.
industryHealthcarePoint1: HIPAA compliance built into architecture from day one
industryHealthcarePoint2: EHR and practice management system integration experience
industryHealthcarePoint3: Patient journey optimization reducing phone volume by up to 55%
industryRetailDesc: Unified inventory management, omnichannel integration, modern POS systems, and order automation.
industryRetailPoint1: Real-time inventory visibility across all sales channels
industryRetailPoint2: Omnichannel integration: online, POS, mobile, and marketplaces
industryRetailPoint3: Automated fulfillment reducing stock-out incidents by up to 95%
metric3Label: Saved per week on manual tasks
socialProofProjectsDesc: Discover how we help businesses transform their operations with custom enterprise solutions.
contactSubheader: Tell us about your project or workflow challenge. We respond within 48 hours with a clear plan — no commitment required.
contactDescPlaceholder: Briefly describe what you are looking to build or automate...
contactStartNote: Most projects start within 2 weeks of our first call.
footerTagline: Made in Jakarta | Serving Clients Globally
